ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the weather station */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date when the station was maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atmospheric_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "height" REAL /* Height above sea level in meters */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percent */,
  "mixing_ratio" REAL /* Mixing ratio in g/kg */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in knots */,
  "potential_temperature" REAL /* Potential temperature in Kelvin */,
  "equivalent_potential_temperature" REAL /* Equivalent potential temperature in Kelvin */,
  "virtual_potential_temperature" REAL /* Virtual potential temperature in Kelvin */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data entry */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Initial quality status of the data */,
  "quality_reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the data quality */,
  "quality_review_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry being quality controlled */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality status (e.g., valid, suspect, invalid) */,
  "quality_note" TEXT /* Note or comment about the quality issue */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the data quality */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the quality review was performed */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from the quality review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., sensor, satellite, manual input) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data source was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality status of the data source mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure storage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser and device) used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., time series, heat map, contour plot) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the last user who modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date and time the report was modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality status of the data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_mapping_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES data_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_mapping_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_archives" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archive */,
  "archive_name" TEXT /* Name of the archive */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the archive */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the archive file in MB */,
  "archive_date" TEXT /* Date and time the archive was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the archive */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the last user who modified the archive */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date and time the archive was modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the archive (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_archives_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_archives_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the forecast model (e.g., deterministic, probabilistic) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the forecast model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the forecast model was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the forecast model (e.g., active, inactive, under development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
